---
title: Arreglos
author: Carlos Lesmes
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    theme: 
      light: flatly
      dark: darkly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: show
    code-tools: true
    code-copy: hover
    code-overflow: wrap
    embed-resources: true
reference-location: margin
lang : es
bibliography: yaml.bib
---

```{r}
arreglo <- array( 
c(0, 0, 35, 0, 0, 0, 17, 0,118, 154, 387, 670, 4, 13, 89, 3,0, 0, 13, 0, 0, 0, 14, 0,57, 80, 140, 192, 0, 0, 76, 20),
dim = c(4, 2, 2, 2),
dimnames = list(
Class = c("1st", "2nd", "3rd", "Crew"),
Sex = c("Male", "Female"),
Age = c("Child", "Adult"),
Survived = c("No", "Yes")
))
str(arreglo)
```
```{r}
df1= as.data.frame(arreglo)
df1
ftable(arreglo)
```

```{r}
str(Titanic)
df2=as.data.frame(Titanic)
df2
ftable(Titanic)
```
```{r}
margin.table(Titanic, 1)  # totals by class
```

```{r}
margin.table(Titanic, 2) 
```
```{r}
as.data.frame.table(arreglo)
```
